title: Free Bird
funFacts: This epic song features one of the longest guitar solos in rock history, lasting over 4 minutes. The song was written as a tribute to [artist:Duane Allman] of the Allman Brothers Band. The famous "Free Bird!" shout-out at concerts originated from this song. The song appears on [album:Pronounced 'Lĕh-'nérd 'Skin-'nérd] from [date:1973].
